channel.title: Docker on OpenSwap Guide | Open Source Alternatives & Self-Hosted Solutions
channel.description: Recent content in Docker on OpenSwap Guide | Open Source Alternatives & Self-Hosted Solutions

item.title: Best Self-Hosted Email Server 2026: Stalwart vs Mailcow vs Mailu (Docker Setup)
item.description: Compare the top self-hosted email server solutions in 2026: Stalwart Mail Server, Mailcow, and Mailu. Complete Docker compose setups, feature comparison, and deployment guides for running your own email server.

item.title: NocoDB vs Baserow vs Directus: Best Open-Source Airtable Alternatives in 2026
item.description: Compare NocoDB, Baserow, and Directus as open-source Airtable alternatives. Docker compose deployment guides, feature comparison, and self-hosting recommendations for 2026.

item.title: Valkey vs DragonflyDB vs Garnet: Best Redis Alternatives in 2026 (Docker Setup)
item.description: Compare the top open-source Redis alternatives in 2026: Valkey, DragonflyDB, and Microsoft Garnet. Benchmarks, Docker compose setups, and migration guides for every use case.

item.title: Wiki.js vs BookStack vs Outline: Best Open-Source Wiki & Knowledge Base in 2026
item.description: Compare Wiki.js, BookStack, and Outline as the best open-source wiki and knowledge base platforms in 2026. Docker compose deployment guides, feature comparison, and self-hosting recommendations.

item.title: Automate Your Home Lab with Watchtower and Ansible
item.description: Automate updates, backups, and maintenance for your self-hosted services using Watchtower, Ansible, and cron jobs.

item.title: Best Self-Hosted Object Storage 2026: SeaweedFS vs MinIO vs Garage (Docker Setup)
item.description: Compare the top self-hosted S3-compatible object storage solutions: SeaweedFS, MinIO, and Garage. Docker compose setups, performance benchmarks, and deployment guides for homelabs and production.

item.title: Docker Compose for Beginners: Complete Guide 2026
item.description: Complete beginner's guide to Docker Compose. Learn how to define, run, and manage multi-container Docker applications with practical examples.

item.title: Headscale Complete Guide 2026: Self-Host Your Own Tailscale Server (Docker Compose Setup)
item.description: Complete guide to deploying Headscale, the open-source Tailscale alternative. Docker Compose setup, node configuration, ACLs, and production best practices for 2026.

item.title: Nginx Proxy Manager vs Traefik vs Caddy: Reverse Proxy Comparison
item.description: Compare Nginx Proxy Manager, Traefik, and Caddy for reverse proxy and SSL management. Docker setup guides and feature comparison for self-hosted services.

item.title: Self-Hosted AI Stack: Complete Local AI Setup Guide 2026
item.description: Complete guide to building a self-hosted AI stack with Ollama, Open WebUI, and embedding models. Docker compose setup for local AI workflows.
